tracks.meaning: the quality of sound in terms of its timbre or color, distinct from pitch and loudness
the manner, attitude, or emotional quality expressed in someone's voice or written words
a sound or quality of the voice produced by vibration of the vocal cords
a medicinal substance or drug, especially one used for treating a specific condition
a metallic element or compound, particularly one with specific properties or purity level
the strength or density of printed color on a surface
the relative lightness or darkness of a color or shade
the overall character, mood, or atmosphere of a situation, environment, or relationship
the state of normal tension or responsiveness in muscles
fashionable style or the quality of being fashionable and sophisticated
